name: Einar
description: __Height:__ 184 cm Einar is a man from Northern England that was sold into slavery. He ends up in Denmark, where he meets [Thorfinn](https://anilist.co/character/10138). Together with him, Einar is working his way out of slavery by harvesting the land his master has lent to him and Thorfinn. ~!After [Arnheid's](https://anilist.co/character/75590) death, he and Thorfinn agree to create a country of peace in Vinland!~

name: Sanae Dekomori

Her "power" is Mjolnir, a pair of hair nunchucks. Despite being a Chuunibyou, she is top in her class. Little was known about her relatives but it's implied that she is from a rich family. ~!She eventually becomes the student council president with Nibutani as her vice president. name: Hiroshi Odokawa
description: __Occupation:__ Taxi Driver Odokawa is an eccentric and quiet person who does not open up to others. He has a serious and compassionate side. His hobbies include listening to rakugo before going to bed and listening to the radio while working. ~!Due to brain damage suffered from a drowning accident in his childhood, Odokawa cannot perceive human beings and instead views them as animals. His condition is solved when he gets in an accident again.!~

name: Diana Cavendish
nativeName: ダイアナ・キャベンディッシュ
description: __Height:__ 168 cm Diana is serious, composed, and erudite. Being descended from a prestigious line of witches back to ancient times, she is exceptionally devoted to her magical studies and to the tradition and history of magic. Her status as Luna Nova's best student cannot be solely attributed to heredity — she has self-discipline and maturity far surpassing the average teenage girl. She quickly becomes Akko's rival, though she doesn't see herself as her rival.

name: Retsu Unohana
description: Unohana is a soft-spoken, polite, and caring woman and is the captain of the 4th Division. She uses honorifics when addressing everyone, including her subordinates, and rarely shows panic or distress. She is even polite when angry (for instance, when members of other divisions bully her division), maintaining her smiling demeanor while radiating a dangerous aura that immediately scares others away.
